creator: fernape@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Erik,

Thanks for the patch.

Could you change this, if possible?

===== env: DEVELOPER_MODE=yes DEVELOPER=1 STRICT_DEPENDS=yes USER=nobody UID=65534 GID=65534
